summary: Excellent recording that captures a fiery Truckin > Scarlet Begonias > Fire sequence with crystal‑clear sound.
review: Both reviewers rave about the performance – the band stays on fire from an explosive Truckin into Scarlet Begonias and culminates in one of the greatest Fire’s ever played. The tape is praised as “excellent,” sounding as good as top‑tier Sennheiser gear, making it a highly enjoyable listen.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are strongly positive (4‑ and 5‑star) highlighting an outstanding show and excellent recording quality; with only two reviews confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes the tape sounds as good as high‑end Sennheiser mics; no flaws or mix issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy flow with Truckin' segued straight into Scarlet Begonias and capped by a legendary Fire, keeping the band "ON" throughout.
